---
title: "TensorCentralDifference"
---

## Overview

`TensorCentralDifference` is a TransformsV2 container transform (TensorData → TensorData) that
appends central-difference (delta) columns to a time-indexed tensor. For each original column, a
new column is computed as:

$$\Delta_c[t] = \frac{\text{value}_c[t+1] - \text{value}_c[t-1]}{2}$$

This is useful for computing first-derivative approximations of features for downstream
machine-learning pipelines.

## Location

- Header: `src/TransformsV2/algorithms/TensorCentralDifference/TensorCentralDifference.hpp`
- Implementation: `src/TransformsV2/algorithms/TensorCentralDifference/TensorCentralDifference.cpp`
- Tests: `src/TransformsV2/algorithms/TensorCentralDifference/TensorCentralDifference.test.cpp`

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `boundary_policy` | `DeltaBoundaryPolicy` | `NaN` | How to handle the first/last row where t-1 or t+1 is missing: `NaN`, `Drop`, `Clamp`, or `Zero` |
| `include_original` | `bool` | `true` | Whether to include the original (unshifted) columns in the output |

## Time-Alignment Rule

Neighbors are determined by **sorted row position** in `TimeIndexStorage`, not by raw frame number ±1.
For example, if rows exist at frames `[10, 20, 50]`, the central difference at frame 20 uses
frame 10 (previous row) and frame 50 (next row).

## Boundary Policies

| Policy | Behavior |
|--------|----------|
| `NaN` | Fill boundary delta values with `NaN`. All rows preserved. |
| `Drop` | Remove the first and last rows. Output has `N-2` rows. |
| `Clamp` | Clamp to current row when t-1 or t+1 is missing (forward/backward half-difference). |
| `Zero` | Fill boundary delta values with `0.0f`. |

## Output Layout

Columns are ordered as: `[original cols (if include_original)] [delta_col0] [delta_col1] ...`

Delta columns are named `"{original_col}_delta"`, e.g. `feat1_delta`.

For an input with N columns, the output has `2*N` columns (with `include_original=true`)
or `N` columns (with `include_original=false`).

## Constraints

- Input must be 2D
- Input must have `RowType::TimeFrameIndex` (Ordinal rows are rejected)
- Returns `nullptr` on validation failure

## Pipeline JSON Example

```json
{
  "transformations": {
    "metadata": { "name": "Central Difference Pipeline", "version": "2.0" },
    "steps": [
      {
        "step_id": "1",
        "transform_name": "TensorCentralDifference",
        "input_key": "features",
        "output_key": "features_with_delta",
        "parameters": {
          "boundary_policy": "NaN",
          "include_original": true
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

## Registration

Registered as `"TensorCentralDifference"` in `RegisteredTransforms.cpp` under category
**Feature Engineering**.

## Related Transforms

- **TensorTemporalNeighbors**: Augments with raw lag/lead feature columns (arbitrary offsets)
